headings.text: Grimani Systems Launches The Reflectance™ System
Grimani Systems Launches The Reflectance™ System: A New Way to Experience Sound
Improving Dialog Clarity and Sound Precision
How It Works: The Technology Behind It
Key Features of the Reflectance™ System

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingGrimani Systems Launches The Reflectance™ SystemPosted on August 28, 2024Grimani Systems Launches The Reflectance™ System: A New Way to Experience SoundAugust 28, 2024 - Novato, CA – Grimani Systems has introduced a new audio technology called the Reflectance™ System. This exciting system is designed to change how we hear sound in media rooms and home theaters, especially in rooms with big video displays or video walls.‍‍Improving Dialog Clarity and Sound PrecisionThe Reflectance™ System is made to improve how we hear people talking in movies and shows. Usually, center speakers sit below or behind the screen, which can make it hard to hear clearly from different parts of the room. Grimani Systems has solved this problem by creating a system that reflects sound waves off the screen. This creates a "virtual" center channel, so the sound seems to come right from the screen, no matter where you are sitting.This technology is all about making sure that you hear every word clearly, as well as every sound effect, no matter where you sit in the room. Whether you’re watching a quiet conversation or a loud action scene, the Reflectance™ System delivers sound with crystal-clear accuracy.‍1” Compression Annular driver in patented CSA waveguide, MSRP $4,500‍How It Works: The Technology Behind ItThe Reflectance™ System uses a special waveguide, which is a device that helps guide sound. This waveguide is placed in the ceiling above the seats in the room. The sound waves bounce off the screen and are directed right into the listening area. This way, the sound appears to be coming directly from the screen.Grimani Systems shared a video showing a beautiful media room in a California beach house where this system is set up. All the speakers, including those for the center, left, and right channels, as well as others, are hidden in the ceiling. The special waveguide reflects sound off the screen. This setup keeps the room looking neat and stylish while still filling it with rich, immersive sound.The Reflectance™ System's ability to reflect sound off the screen means there’s no need for visible speakers near the display. The room has a clean look, but the sound still surrounds you, pulling you into the movie or show.‍‍Key Features of the Reflectance™ SystemThe Reflectance™ System is built to offer both high performance and flexibility. Here are the key features:Reflective Sound Technology: Uses a special waveguide to bounce sound waves off large video screens, creating a virtual center channel for a more realistic sound experience.‍Enhanced Dialog Clarity: Makes sure voices in movies and shows are clear, so you don’t miss a single word.‍Perfect for Large Video Displays: Works great in media rooms and home theaters with big screens or video walls, ensuring the same high sound quality no matter where you sit.‍1” Compression Annular Driver: Comes with a powerful 1” driver in Grimani Systems’ special waveguide for accurate sound delivery.‍Compact yet Powerful Design: The system’s cabinet is 26” x 20” x 16” and comes in black or white, so it blends in easily with any room style.‍Integrated DSP Amplification: Includes a 320-watt DSP amplifier with digital signal processing for Bass Sharing and room EQ, making sure the sound is perfect for your specific room.‍Remote Management and Monitoring: Offers easy setup, 24/7 monitoring, diagnostics, and over-IP remote management for continuous top performance.‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Yasin or Charley.‍‍‍‍‍‍Services:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‍Proudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral
